name: 01-php-mysql.djvu
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — scanned multi-page DjVu (PHP/MySQL). No text layer → exercises the OCR-disabled graceful path.

name: 02-lean-websites.epub
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — Barbara Bermes, Lean Websites (2015). EPUB: pure-JS parser, OPF spine + NCX nav.

name: 03-salesforce-architect.epub
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — Bahri, Becoming a Salesforce Certified Technical Architect, 2nd ed. (2023). Large EPUB (~29 MB).

name: 04-rails-up-and-running.chm
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — Hibbs & Tate, Ruby on Rails: Up and Running (O'Reilly, 2005). CHM exercises 7z extract + composite-HTML assembly.

name: 05-ru-1993.djvu
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — multi-page DjVu (Russian, 1993). Exercises text-layer extraction vs OCR fallback.

name: 06-aspnet-mvc.djvu
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — ASP.NET MVC Framework / C# book (DjVu, 2010).

name: 07-ru-2005.fb2
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — FB2 (FictionBook 2.0, windows-1251, 2005). XML-based, pure-JS parser — exercises legacy-encoding handling.

name: 08-ru-2017.fb2
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — FB2 (FictionBook 2.0, UTF-8, 2017). XML-based, pure-JS parser.

name: 09-ru-2006.docx
notes: Operator-supplied fixture — DOCX (Word 2007+, 2006). OOXML zip, pure-JS parser.
